name: ClawKit for WhisprAI
description: Pair this OpenClaw computer with WhisprAI so Archie can act as a private local assistant.

relayToken.description: Secret token used to poll the WhisprAI relay.

inboundSecret.description: Secret used when posting results back to WhisprAI.

agentId.description: OpenClaw agent id shown in WhisprAI.

openclawCommand.description: Optional OpenClaw executable path or command. Leave empty to use openclaw from PATH.

openclawArgsPrefix.description: Optional arguments inserted before the agent command, for advanced launch setups.
